title: pelargonium fissifolium
intro: Pelargonium fissifolium, also known as the split-leaf geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium fissifolium include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium fissifolium include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
